summary: Completed full frontend testing of admin panel reorganization (iteration 48). All 14 test objectives passed. Verified Articles page hero styling, Auth & Pages tile grid with 4 groups (12 tiles), Login/SignUp/Checkout Builder/Messages/Form Response SlideOvers, Forms section (2 tiles only), Footer & Nav expanded section (17 fields), Email Templates full render, System Config Override Codes sub-section, Save Changes button, and SlideOver save/close.
passed_tests: Articles page hero: dark rounded card (bg-[#0f172a], rounded-3xl, shadow), RESOURCES label, red dash separator (.bg-red-500), 'Articles & Guides' title - all confirmed

Auth & Pages section: 4-group tile grid rendered - AUTHENTICATION (Login Page, Sign Up Page, Verify Email), APP PAGES (Customer Portal, Profile Page, 404 Not Found, GoCardless Callback), CHECKOUT FLOW (Partner + Zoho toggles, Checkout Builder, Checkout Success, Bank Transfer), MESSAGES (Checkout Messages, Form Responses) - 12 tiles total
Login Page SlideOver: Opens with Portal label (Customer Portal pre-filled), Title (Welcome back), Subtitle (Sign in to continue.) fields + Save Changes button

Sign Up SlideOver: Opens with Page title, Page subtitle, Form title, Form subtitle fields + FormSchemaBuilder showing REGISTRATION FORM FIELDS with 5 fields (Full Name, Email, Password, Company Name, Job Title, Phone, Country)

Checkout Builder SlideOver: Opens with VISIBILITY TOGGLES (Partner Tagging + Zoho), DYNAMIC SECTIONS (NEW BUILDER), ZOHO ACCOUNT SETTINGS legacy section, PARTNER TAGGING SETTINGS legacy section, Save Changes button
Checkout Messages SlideOver: Opens with 5 fields - Partner tagging prompt, Override code required, Cart empty, Currency unsupported, No payment methods
Form Responses SlideOver: Opens with Quote request success + Scope request success fields
Forms section: Only 2 tiles (Quote Request Form - 5 fields, Scope Request Form - 6 fields). No Signup tile. Link 'Auth & Pages → Sign Up' present at bottom

Footer & Nav section: All 17 fields present - Footer Tagline, Copyright, About Us Section title/text, Navigation section title + Store/Articles/Portal labels, Contact section title + email/phone, Social Media title + Twitter/LinkedIn/Facebook/Instagram/YouTube URLs
Footer on website: NAVIGATION heading visible (rendered via CSS uppercase from value 'Navigation'). AppFooter renders [data-testid='footer-nav-title'] correctly
Email Templates section: Full EmailSection renders - Integrations (RESEND with Mocked toggle), email templates list with Article Shared, Order Confirmation, Password Reset, Quote Request, etc.
System Config: OVERRIDE CODES sub-section with override_code_expiry_hours (value=72, type=number) rendered in dedicated box. FEATURE FLAGS section with partner_tagging_enabled shown separately
Save Changes button (data-testid='website-save-btn'): Clicked successfully, shows 'Settings saved' toast

SlideOver Save button (data-testid='slideover-save'): Clicked on Verify Email SlideOver, shows 'Saved' toast, SlideOver closes (translate-x-0 removed). Close button (data-testid='slideover-close') also works
critical_code_review_comments: System Config Override Codes section uses CSS 'uppercase' for the h4 heading ('Override Codes' renders as 'OVERRIDE CODES') - this is consistent with other sub-section headings in the page and is intentional styling.
The 'Operations' category is filtered to exclude override_code_expiry_hours from the main list, which correctly routes it to the dedicated Override Codes box - good separation.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Admin panel reorganization (iteration 48) fully tested and verified. Key structure: WebsiteTab sidebar has BRAND (Branding & Hero), CONTENT (Auth & Pages, Forms, Email Templates), CONFIGURATION (Footer & Nav, References, Payments, System Config). Auth & Pages has tile grid with 4 labeled groups. All SlideOvers open with correct fields. Forms has 2 tiles only. Footer & Nav has About Us + Social Media. System Config has Override Codes sub-section. Admin login: admin@automateaccounts.local / ChangeMe123!. All APIs returning successfully. No issues found.
mocked_apis: Email sending is MOCKED (Resend toggle shown as 'Mocked' in Email Templates section)
